input.background: Identify whether the studies described here are based on single samples, paired samples, or independent samples.
input.question: A nutritional exam is applied to a random sample of individuals. Results are compared to expected means and proportions.

individuals_sample.description: The group of individuals who were part of the nutritional exam.

expected_means.value: Expected means for the nutritional exam
expected_means.description: The expected mean values that the nutritional exam results are compared against.

expected_proportions.value: Expected proportions for the nutritional exam
expected_proportions.description: The expected proportion values that the nutritional exam results are compared against.

exam_results.description: The actual results obtained from the nutritional exam applied to the sample.
